title: callicarpa prolifera
intro: Callicarpa prolifera, also known as the purple plumier, is a flowering plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure and acting as an antiseptic, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Callicarpa prolifera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
